title: culcitium tenellum
intro: Culcitium tenellum, also known as the thread-leaved culcitium, is a flowering plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin conditions. The health benefits of Culcitium tenellum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Culcitium tenellum are typically made from the leaves and flowers, and can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal herb.
